summary: Frontend testing completed for ZET Mindshare new features: Chart column colors, Chart background image (Image/AI Image), Gradient Presets in Color panel, ZETA image upload, ZETA TTS (Volume2 icon), and Zoom tool auto-follow magnifier. All requested features verified working.
passed_tests: Settings menu opens showing Shortcuts and fastSelect options
Editor page loads with Fast Select bar at bottom
Chart/Graphic panel: Column Colors section with individual color pickers for each column (1: blue, 2: red, 3: green, 4: orange)
Chart/Graphic panel: Background Image section with 'Image' and 'AI Image' buttons
Color Picker panel: Gradient Presets section with 6 presets (Sunset, Ocean, Purple, Green, Fire, Night)
Color Picker panel: Clicking Sunset preset populates gradient Start/End colors
Color Picker panel: 'Gradient Text' checkbox and 'Apply Gradient' button
ZETA chat panel: Image upload button with title='Add image' found
ZETA chat panel: TTS Volume2 icon appears on assistant messages
Zoom tool: Magnifier circle appears and follows mouse automatically when tool is active
Text tool: Creates editable text on canvas click
Draw tool: Creates pen strokes on canvas
critical_code_review_comments: GRADIENT_PRESETS array in Editor.js correctly defines 6 gradient presets with start/end colors
chartColors state array properly manages individual column colors in Chart panel
chartImage state allows background image upload for charts
RightPanel.js has handleImageUpload for ZETA image upload functionality
RightPanel.js speakMessage function uses ElevenLabs TTS with fallback to browser TTS
CanvasArea.js zoom tool sets magnifierActive=true and tracks magnifierPosition on mouse move
seed_data_creation: Created test user, session, and document via mongosh
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested new features verified: (1) Chart Column Colors - individual color pickers per column, (2) Chart Image/AI Image buttons for background, (3) Gradient Presets in Color panel (Sunset, Ocean, Purple, Green, Fire, Night), (4) ZETA image upload button, (5) ZETA TTS Volume2 icon on messages, (6) Zoom tool auto-follows mouse without clicking. MOCKED: Google Drive integration (still mock).
mocked_apis: Google Drive file operations (mock token only)

features_tested_summary.chart_column_colors: VERIFIED - Color pickers numbered 1,2,3,4 for each data column
features_tested_summary.chart_image_ai_image: VERIFIED - 'Image' and 'AI Image' buttons in Background Image section
features_tested_summary.gradient_presets: VERIFIED - 6 presets (Sunset, Ocean, Purple, Green, Fire, Night) with gradient preview
features_tested_summary.zeta_image_upload: VERIFIED - Image button with file upload for sending images to ZETA
features_tested_summary.zeta_tts_speaker_icon: VERIFIED - Volume2 icon appears on assistant messages for TTS playback
features_tested_summary.zoom_auto_magnifier: VERIFIED - Circular magnifier follows mouse movement when zoom tool active
features_tested_summary.fast_select_bar: VERIFIED - Visible at bottom with Zap icon and 4 tools
